item.title: When I was 6 years old, my dad told me he would give me $5 if I found a 4-leaf clover. Today I was watering my new trees and saw this. My dad is no longer with us but I yelled at the top of my lungs, “Dad, you owe me $5!”
item.description: When I was 6 years old, my dad told me he would give me $5 if I found a 4-leaf clover. Today I was watering my new trees and saw this. My dad is no longer with us but I yelled at the top of my lungs, “Dad, you owe me $5!”
